content: For image-attribution disputes, OPEN the image (multimodal Read) before deciding. Filename heuristics and hash matching are necessary but not sufficient — actually looking caught Seven Seas Voyager misnamed as Voyager_of_the_Seas, a Celebrity Wanderer photo mislabeled as both Compass and Seeker, and a 3D anaglyph mislabeled as Rijndam, and confirmed three perceptual-scanner hits as false positives. Operator turning point: 'They are wildly different ships, you can't tell by looking?' If two scanner hits look the same, look; if they don't, the filename is the lie.
